svg.title: half_arc_terminal_v1
svg.desc: half_arc_terminal_v1 maintained baseline geometry at 800 meter radius with low, mid, and high time-to-go bands.
svg.text: One-sided terminal arrival geometry · radius = 800m · gravity = 9.81m/s² (earth baseline)
Bands are solved from time-to-go. Low may start upward at shallow cells when the tuned practical flight time calls for it.
